# Average remaining lease term calculation
# Using weighted average based on payment schedule

# Operating leases payments by year (in millions)
op_2025 = 4789
op_2026 = 4166
op_2027 = 3527
op_2028 = 2885
op_2029 = 2130
op_thereafter = 7978

# Finance leases payments by year (in millions)
fin_2025 = 293
fin_2026 = 285
fin_2027 = 284
fin_2028 = 286
fin_2029 = 294
fin_thereafter = 416

# Calculate weighted average remaining term (approximating "thereafter" as 10 years from 2025)
op_weighted_term = (op_2025*1 + op_2026*2 + op_2027*3 + op_2028*4 + op_2029*5 + op_thereafter*10) / (op_2025 + op_2026 + op_2027 + op_2028 + op_2029 + op_thereafter)
fin_weighted_term = (fin_2025*1 + fin_2026*2 + fin_2027*3 + fin_2028*4 + fin_2029*5 + fin_thereafter*10) / (fin_2025 + fin_2026 + fin_2027 + fin_2028 + fin_2029 + fin_thereafter)

print(f"Weighted average remaining term - Operating leases: {op_weighted_term:.1f} years")
print(f"Weighted average remaining term - Finance leases: {fin_weighted_term:.1f} years")

(op_weighted_term, fin_weighted_term)
